message:
fix(web): prevent infinite loop from empty highlight strings

Filter out empty/whitespace-only strings from the highlights array
before building the regex pattern. An empty string in the pattern
would create a regex like /()/gi that matches empty strings at every
position without advancing lastIndex, causing an infinite loop.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
